texto: Tonight shall be the very beginning.''Was it?''It shall be. For me.''My beginning was the albatrosses.''That is a good beginning
autor: I am glad it is yours. Tonight shall be mine.''Ought we to have different ones?''Different beginnings? I think we must.''Will there be more of them?''A great many more. Are your eyes closed?''Yes. Are yours?''Yes. Though it's so dark it hardly makes a difference.''I feel—more than myself.''I feel—as though a new chamber of my heart has opened.''Listen.''What is it?''The rain.

I think we must.''Will there be more of them?''A great many more. Are your eyes closed?''Yes. Are yours?''Yes. Though it's so dark it hardly makes a difference.''I feel—more than myself.''I feel—as though a new chamber of my heart has opened.''Listen.''What is it?''The rain. que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “Tonight shall be the very beginning.''Was it?''It shall be. For me.''My beginning was the albatro…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, eleanor-catton, the-luminaries, com foco em boa-noite e reflexao-noturna.
